title: examples: adding a basic lighttpd example

comments.body: Really good thought, I'd not considered examples.  A bit of documentation inside or out would be nice for this (and future) examples.  Red Hat CI isn't happy with you either.

the build failure is unrelated. hopefully another run will get past the rpmdb issues on CI.

These kinds of examples need to be abundant. Plus copy-and-paste examples right on the front README.md
LGTM.  @vbatts, thanks for the comment updates.  I concur about the test issues not being related to these changes.
